Tools/OSINT Framework

OSINT

OSINT Framework

Browser-based directory of OSINT resources organized by investigation category.

osintreferencedirectorypeopledomainsresearch

Best For

Good starting point when you need to choose the right public-data source for a research question.

Responsible Use

Use this tool only in owned environments, classroom labs, CTFs, or engagements where you have explicit written permission. Keep notes focused on findings, risk, and remediation.

Official Resource

https://osintframework.com/

Search Hints

osint, reference, directory, people, domains, research

No ads. Markdown-powered. Built for quick reference.
